channel.title: Kotlin - Tag - Milletgrain

item.title: Mobile Apps
item.author: Luca Cipressi
item.description: A portfolio-style archive of mobile apps I developed across iOS and Android: an experimental Little Prince reader, a peer-to-peer messaging app, music tuning utilities, a tone generator, and a local-first PDF reader.
